title: Warhammer Quest - Take a Look - Part Two - The Adventure book and The Role Play book
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z-s3rXFeosc

Daniel (@dungeondive) continues the Warhammer Quest deep dive with the two books that define the game's dual identity: the Adventure Book for straightforward dungeon bashing, and the Role Play Book for those who want to take things further into campaign territory. The distinction between these two modes is what gives Warhammer Quest its unusual depth.

The walkthrough covers both books page by page — the settlement events, the journey hazards, the levelling system, and the transition from board game to something closer to a pen-and-paper RPG. It's the mechanical heart of what makes this game more than a simple dungeon crawl.

----

Do you prefer your dungeon crawlers to stay as board games, or do you like when they blur into RPG territory?
